# Factory Doctrine Inventory

Pack: factory-core-v1 (1.0.0)
Profile: fsharp-elm-service-v1

This document is generated. Do not edit it directly.

## Doctrines

- **`doctrine-inventory`** — A generated doctrine inventory documents the enabled doctrines for human review.
- **`doctrine-projection-integrity`** — Doctrine projection must be a deterministic, repo-scoped, fail-closed operation.
- **`factory-makefile-integration`** — The root Makefile must include the generated Factory fragment.
- **`generated-file-ownership`** — Compiler-managed files are owned by the compiler and must not be edited by hand.
- **`lock-file-validation`** — The committed lock file must match the canonical projection exactly.
- **`native-gate-extension`** — The repository owns its native gate target; the projection only establishes the dependency path.
- **`no-hand-edits-of-managed-files`** — Compiler-managed files must not be edited manually.
- **`read-only-factorization`** — make factorize must never invoke compile, never rewrite the lock, and never modify source files.
- **`repo-hygiene`** — Repository must satisfy the same hygiene checks as Leamas itself.
